# AIBgin — Safe AI Chatbot Platform for K-12 Schools
> FERPA, COPPA and KCSiE-compliant AI platform. Zero student accounts. QR code access. Real-time AIBguard safety audit.

## Key facts
- Pricing: Starter $49/mo, Growth $149/mo, District $499/mo
- Compliance: FERPA, COPPA, KCSiE, EU AI Act, GDPR, ISO 42001
- Contact: schools@aibgin.info

## What is AIBgin?

AIBgin is a white-label AI chatbot platform designed specifically for K-12 schools, MATs (Multi-Academy Trusts), and school districts. Built with safety at its core, AIBgin provides real-time AI guardrailing through AIBguard — a dual-model audit layer that runs on every student response.

### Key Features

- **Zero Student Accounts**: Students access AIBgin via QR code only. No registration, no personal data collection, no parent consent forms needed.
- **Real-Time Safety Audit**: Every AI response is evaluated by AIBguard (Claude Sonnet + Haiku). Fail-closed: any doubt = block.
- **5-Year Audit Log**: Every interaction is logged with the safety verdict and reason code, stored EU-only for Ofsted inspection.
- **Age-Appropriate Profiles**: Separate guardrails for KS1, KS2, KS3/4, and Post-16 students.
- **Crisis Detection**: Purpose-trained detection of self-harm signals, grooming patterns, and distress. Immediate escalation to safeguarding lead.
- **Per-Tenant Encryption**: AES-256 encryption keyed per school. No data commingling.
- **EU Data Residency**: All data stored and processed within the EU. GDPR Article 46 compliant. No US transfers.

### Compliance

- **EU AI Act**: Article 28b high-risk AI in education
- **GDPR**: No student PII. EU-only processing. Article 28 DPA ready.
- **UK GDPR & KCSiE**: Aligned with ICO guidance and statutory safeguarding requirements
- **COPPA-aligned**: Zero child account creation. Child-safe by design.
- **FERPA**: No student directory information collected.
- **ISO 42001**: AI Management System standards
- **NIST AI RMF**: Govern, Map, Measure, Manage

### Pricing Plans

1. **Starter** — $49/mo
   - Up to 5 classrooms
   - 50,000 queries/month
   - AIBguard audit
   - Age-appropriate profiles
   - 1-year audit log
   - Email support

2. **Growth** — $149/mo (Most Popular)
   - Up to 20 classrooms
   - 200,000 queries/month
   - Everything in Starter +
   - Crisis detection
   - Safeguarding lead escalation
   - Custom guardrails
   - 5-year audit log
   - Priority support

3. **District** — $499/mo
   - Unlimited classrooms
   - Unlimited queries
   - Everything in Growth +
   - White-label branding
   - SSO/LDAP
   - Dedicated account manager
   - SLA 99.9% uptime
   - Custom data retention

### Deployment

- **Setup time**: 30 minutes (no IT infrastructure required)
- **Runtime**: Fully cloud-based, no on-prem installation
- **Browser-native**: Works on any device with a modern browser
- **Reliability**: SLA 99.9% uptime on District plans

### Contact & Support

- **Sales & Demo**: schools@aibgin.info
- **Technical Support**: support@aibgin.info
- **General Enquiries**: info@aibgin.info

---

**About AIBlab**

AIBgin is built and operated by AIBlab (SAY TO PAY s.r.o.), a Czech EdTech firm specializing in child-safe AI and safeguarding technology. Part of the AIB ecosystem (AIBgin for schools, AIBguard for safety, AIBSN for identity).
